query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A close-up photograph of dark knit textile fabric showing an interlocking woven or crocheted surface pattern that fills the entire frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extremely underexposed close-up of dark knit textile fabric where crushed shadows and near-total loss of detail render the interlocking woven pattern almost indistinguishable, dissolving the surface texture into ambiguous darkness with only faint traces of the material structure visible.
